title: elatostema atroviride var. atroviride
intro: Elatostema atroviride var. atroviride is a type of creeping plant also known as black vein polynesian shield or Elatostema atroviride, belonging to the family Urticaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. Elatostema atroviride var. atroviride is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are typically consumed orally for its medicinal and therapeutic effects.
